question: How does Anote use fine-tuning?
answer: Anote provides a platform for participants to build and deploy custom large language models (LLMs) using their own data, utilizing its end-to-end MLOps platform. Specifically, it allows users to perform fine-tuning of LLMs through supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) methods.
